ast.name: title
ast.source: Resrt to codeblock config (can only do this once)
ast.target: 重置为代码块配置（此操作仅可执行一次）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Permanentally save all your modifications to the scene
ast.target: 永久保存您对场景的所有修改

ast.name: title
ast.source: Set the scene color
ast.target: 设置场景颜色

ast.name: title
ast.source: Toggle a grid and axis
ast.target: 切换网格和坐标轴

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: You just updated/Installed the 3D embed plugin. If you'd like to learn how to control your scenes with more details or suggest new features check out my
ast.target: 您刚刚更新/安装了 3D 嵌入插件。如果您想了解如何更详细地控制您的场景或建议新功能，请查看我的

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If you updated from a version older than 1.0.8: this update the syntax of the codeblock has significantly changed. This causes the old embeds to stop working.
ast.target: 如果您从 1.0.8 之前的版本更新：此次更新中代码块的语法已发生重大变化。这会导致旧的嵌入停止工作。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: To fix this, remove your old codeblock and execute the 3D embed command again.
ast.target: 要解决此问题，请移除您的旧代码块并再次执行 3D 嵌入命令。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Now there is a chance you already put a lot of effort into the current setup of your models, unfortunately if you want to keep this setup, you will have to do a bit of manual work. You can review the updated syntax in the
ast.target: 现在，您可能已经在当前模型的设置上投入了大量精力，但不幸的是，如果您想保留此设置，将需要进行一些手动工作。您可以在

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: and fill in your values for the new syntax.
ast.target: 中查看更新后的语法，并为新语法填入您的值。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Apologies for the inconvenience. But I hope you can keep enjoying the plugin with all its new functions.
ast.target: 对于给您带来的不便，我们深表歉意。但我希望您能继续享受插件及其所有新功能。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Thank you and Enjoy!
ast.target: 谢谢，祝您使用愉快！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this setting will load the codeblocks in your markdownnotes with all the settings you can configure. If false it will load only the minimally required settings
ast.target: 如果为 true，此设置将使用所有可配置的设置加载 Markdown 笔记中的代码块。如果为 false，则仅加载最低要求的设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default background in your 3d scenes: either a color or transparent
ast.target: 3D 场景中的默认背景：颜色或透明

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default background color for 3d scenes
ast.target: 3D 场景的默认背景颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default height of a 3d embed in your note (in pixels)
ast.target: 笔记中 3D 嵌入的默认高度（以像素为单位）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default width percentage of a 3d embed in your note (in percentage of the note width)
ast.target: 笔记中 3D 嵌入的默认宽度百分比（占笔记宽度的百分比）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, will automatically rotate your scene to get a showcase effect
ast.target: 如果为 true，将自动旋转场景以获得展示效果

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, will toggle smooth and damped orbit controls (e.g.) the model will rotate a bit more after you let go
ast.target: 如果为 true，将切换平滑且带阻尼的轨道控制（例如，松开后模型会继续旋转一点）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If true, will show a ground plane that can receive shadows from models and lights. 
Note: may impact performance, and your lightsources also need have "castshadows": true
ast.target: 如果为 true，将显示一个可以接收模型和灯光阴影的地面平面。\n注意：可能会影响性能，并且您的光源也需要设置 \"castshadows\": true

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, will show basic GUI options for a scene (color selector, grid checkbox) upon model load. Can also be set in the codeblock config
ast.target: 如果为 true，将在模型加载时显示场景的基本 GUI 选项（颜色选择器、网格复选框）。也可以在代码块配置中设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default size of 3d models in scene (non whole numbers should be seperated by dot, not comma)
ast.target: 场景中 3D 模型的默认大小（非整数应使用点号分隔，而不是逗号）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default position of the model in your scene (X,y,z)
ast.target: 场景中模型的默认位置 (X,y,z)

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 场景中模型的默认旋转 (X,y,z)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default position of the camera in your scene (X,y,z)
ast.target: 场景中相机的默认位置 (X,y,z)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defaults a camera type. You can also set this per scene, in the codeblock config.
ast.target: 默认相机类型。您也可以在代码块配置中为每个场景单独设置。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 聚光灯的角度（以弧度为单位）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced option: If enabled uses scissoring to use one renderer for the grid (more resource friendly). If disabled uses one renderer for each grid cell. Requires restart to take effect
ast.target: 高级选项：如果启用，使用裁剪模式为网格使用一个渲染器（更节省资源）。如果禁用，则为每个网格单元格使用一个渲染器。需要重启才能生效

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: STL 模型的默认模型颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, will show all .STL models with a wireframe mode.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder inside your vault where snapshots are saved when clicking the camera icon. Leave empty to save to the vault root.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a snapshot is exported, automatically add a "3d embed-thumbnail" property to the note with a link to the saved image. Useful for showing preview images in bases card view.
ast.target: 导出快照时，自动向笔记添加一个 \"3d embed-thumbnail\" 属性，其中包含指向保存图像的链接。对于在基础卡片视图中显示预览图像很有用。
